stories.i_want_to: log in securely with my credentials
stories.so_that: I can access the POS system and process sales.

stories.i_want_to: log in securely with my credentials
stories.so_that: I can manage the shop and view reports.

stories.i_want_to: log out of the system
stories.so_that: my session is terminated and my account is secure.

stories.i_want_to: create new cashier accounts
stories.so_that: I can onboard new staff members.

stories.i_want_to: assign roles to users (Admin, Cashier)
stories.so_that: I can control their access to different features.

stories.i_want_to: add a new product with details like name, price, SKU, and initial stock
stories.so_that: it can be sold through the POS system.

stories.i_want_to: edit an existing product's details (e.g., price, name, stock)
stories.so_that: I can keep product information up-to-date.

stories.i_want_to: delete a product
stories.so_that: I can remove discontinued or erroneous items from the system.

stories.i_want_to: view a list of all products
stories.so_that: I can quickly find items to add to a sale.

stories.i_want_to: search for products by name or SKU
stories.so_that: I can efficiently locate specific items.

stories.i_want_to: upload an image for a product
stories.so_that: it's easier to identify and manage products visually.

stories.i_want_to: add products to a customer's cart by searching or scanning
stories.so_that: I can build a transaction quickly.

stories.i_want_to: adjust the quantity of an item in the cart
stories.so_that: I can correct mistakes or handle multiple purchases of the same item.

stories.i_want_to: remove an item from the cart
stories.so_that: I can correct mistakes before completing a sale.

stories.i_want_to: apply a discount (percentage or fixed amount) to an item or the entire cart
stories.so_that: I can offer promotions or special pricing.

stories.i_want_to: process a cash payment and calculate change due
stories.so_that: I can complete cash transactions efficiently.

stories.i_want_to: process a card payment
stories.so_that: I can accept non-cash transactions.

stories.i_want_to: hold a transaction and recall it later
stories.so_that: I can serve other customers while one customer is still deciding or fetching items.

stories.i_want_to: process a return for a previously sold item
stories.so_that: I can handle customer refunds or exchanges.

stories.i_want_to: view a list of past transactions
stories.so_that: I can reference previous sales or find items for returns.

stories.i_want_to: automatically decrement product stock when a sale is completed
stories.so_that: inventory levels are always accurate.

stories.i_want_to: manually adjust the stock level of a product
stories.so_that: I can account for stock takes, damages, or new deliveries.

stories.i_want_to: receive alerts when a product's stock falls below a predefined threshold
stories.so_that: I can reorder items before they run out.

stories.i_want_to: view a daily, weekly, and monthly sales summary report
stories.so_that: I can understand my shop's performance over time.

stories.i_want_to: view a report of top-selling and least-selling products
stories.so_that: I can make informed decisions about product ordering and promotions.

stories.i_want_to: view a detailed transaction history with filters (date, cashier)
stories.so_that: I can audit sales and investigate discrepancies.

stories.i_want_to: print a receipt for a completed transaction
stories.so_that: customers have proof of purchase.

stories.i_want_to: email a digital receipt to a customer
stories.so_that: customers have a convenient digital record and I can reduce paper waste.

stories.i_want_to: customize the information displayed on receipts (e.g., shop name, address, logo)
stories.so_that: receipts reflect my shop's branding and essential information.
